firstNightReminder: Show the Informant a player who woke up tonight.
otherNightReminder: Show the Informant a player who woke up tonight.
name: Informant
ability: Each night, learn a player who woke up tonight due to their own ability.

otherNightReminder: If tonight is Night 4, Armageddon chooses 3 players. 1 must be good, tell them to choose again if 1 isn't. The 3 chosen players can't switch alignment. Kill all players not 'Sheltered'.
name: Armageddon
ability: On night four, choose three alive players (not travellers), they can't switch alignment from now on, one must be good, & all other players die, even if for some reason they could not. If nobody dies on day 4, your team wins.
flavor: I am become death, destroyer of worlds. -J. Robert Oppenheimer

otherNightReminder: They might choose a player. Put the 'Poisoned' reminder token on the chosen player. If the Arsonist chooses no one, kill all players that are Poisoned. Even if the Arsonist isn't Poisoning them. Then, make players the Arsonist is poisoning Healthy.
name: Arsonist
ability: Each night, you may choose a player: they are poisoned. If you choose no one, all poisoned players die then become healthy if you poisoned them. No one dies on night 1.
flavor: Some people just want to watch the world burn.

otherNightReminder: The Warden chooses a player & has a chat with them. At any point in the chat, the Warden chooses if they want the player to die or not. If yes, they die right before dawn.
name: Warden
ability: Each night*, choose a player: you have a private conversation with them during the night. They might not wake to use their ability tonight. Once per game, you can kill the player you chose.
